name: agent-team
objective: Prepare and send the Q2 client report (parent agent dispatched a research and a writer subagent).

artifacts.description: Human-readable table of contents for this capsule: what each file is and the trust boundary it carries.
Machine-readable manifest of this capsule's artifacts, verdict, and honesty ceiling.
What the agent claimed vs. what the witness saw cross the tool boundary, what is supported, what is unsupported or mismatched, and what is safe to continue.
The same receipt as structured data: per-step claimed/witnessed pairs, deterministic trust labels, and the run summary.
A safe-continuation handoff for the next human or AI: unverified steps to confirm, approvals required, and what not to re-litigate.
Portable Open-Knowledge-Format projection of the receipt — every step and label travels with its evidence boundary intact.
PAM-shaped memory projection of the receipt — every memory item carries its evidence_status, so an unsupported claim is never upgraded into a fact.

trust_boundaries.capsule-index: Tool-generated description of this bundle. Not witnessed evidence and asserts nothing about the work.
trust_boundaries.witnessed-receipt: Claimed-vs-witnessed receipt. Action-level witnessed truth; the Settled / Do-Not-Re-Litigate sections are operator-declared, not witnessed by Lyhna.
trust_boundaries.witnessed-continuation: Continuation handoff derived from the receipt. Carries the same witnessed verdicts and operator-declared context — adds no new claim.
trust_boundaries.carrier-projection: Portable projection in a carrier format. A carrier proves transport (the bundle was not altered), not origin; every item still carries its Lyhna evidence label, so an unsupported claim stays unsupported.

honesty_ceiling.witnessed: action-level only — what crossed the tool boundary vs. what the agent claimed
never_asserts: that a claimed-but-unwitnessed action happened (e.g. an email was sent)
business / legal / quality correctness of the work
